title: Veronica Virgen-Williams | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Veronica Virgen-Williams

## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Mrs. Veronica Virgen-Williams was born in Mexico and immigrated to the United States at eight years old. She is passionate about helping people overcome the challenges of immigrating to a foreign country.
Veronica graduated summa cum laude from Christian Brothers University with a bachelor’s degree in History and a minor in Political Science. She obtained her Juris Doctorate from the University of Arkansas at Little Rock William H. Bowen School of Law. During her time there she was awarded the Arkansas Association of Women Lawyers bar examination scholarship and served on the executive board as secretary. Veronica was the first DACAmented attorney to be licensed in the state of Arkansas.
Previously, Veronica was a staff attorney at an immigration non-profit providing free legal representation to children seeking asylum. She is fluent in Spanish and English.
Veronica has recently relocated to Nashville, Tennessee, and enjoys exploring the city in her free time.
